home.about_title: Established in 2000, Minh Thanh Co., Ltd. is a prestigious contractor with over 25 years of experience in consulting and installing electrical systems up to 35kV, urban lighting, and solar energy.
home.about_desc_long: With a team of skilled engineers and a systematic production process, we are committed to providing safe and sustainable energy solutions.
home.slogan: Taking "Your Trust!" as our compass, Minh Thanh continuously accompanies you on every journey.
home.sector_1_desc: Full-package electrical system installation for factories and households.
home.sector_2_desc: Construction of transmission lines and substation systems up to 35kV.
home.sector_3_desc: Lighting solutions for streets and modern urban areas with high energy efficiency.
home.sector_4_desc: Installation of high-performance solar panel systems for businesses.
